CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up And Request For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:06 am and concluding at 10:25 am

Cross-complainant Philadelphia Indemnity Insurance Co. is represented by Tim Tomlin, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Cross-Defendant David Stephen Barnes not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

ROBIN WILCOX is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Cross-complainant Philadelphia Indemnity Insurance Co., and against Cross-Defendant David Stephen Barnes, as follows:

1. Damages: $35,500.00
2. Costs: $792.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $36,292.00
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
